# `mise untrust`

- **Usage**: `mise untrust [CONFIG_FILE]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/untrust.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/untrust.rs)

No longer trust a config, will prompt in the future

## Arguments

### `[CONFIG_FILE]`

The config file to untrust
